response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent tooling, but lacks demonstrable AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform leadership at scale, and advanced AI credentials — key for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial track record with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud (AWS CDK), and modern dev practices
Active knowledge sharing and community engagement via workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading AI/ML products or platforms at scale
Career gap and recent short-term roles raise questions about sustained strategic impact
Lacks advanced degree in AI or demonstrated expertise in cloud AI strategy beyond tooling
